message:
fix(layout): simplify synthetic_dag edge generation

Replace modulo-based edge target calculation with direct addition.
The old code used `(i + j) % node_count` then filtered `target > i`,
which was correct but unnecessarily complex — the modulo wrapping
would always produce targets < i for late nodes, which would be
filtered out anyway. Now uses `i + j` with bounds check `< node_count`.

Also adds docstring explaining that late nodes naturally have fewer
outgoing edges (they are DAG sinks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
